'''Misch'an''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who sometimes served in the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] aboard the [[MC80A Home One Type Heavy Star Cruiser/Legends|MC80 ''Home One'' type Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. A popular pilot, Misch'an was often seen with fellow pilots [[Karka]] and [[Dontal]] aboard the ''Independence''. Along with Karka and Dontal, Misch'an was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the [[Battle of Brigia (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Brigia]]<ref name="CSWE" /> during [[Operation Strike Fear]].<ref name="XWOSG" />
